summary.lv: Entain NCE meklē Full-stack izstrādātāju ar fokus uz back-end, kurš strādās ar TypeScript/NestJS lietojumprogrammām un Angular front-end.
summary.en: Entain NCE seeks a Full-stack Developer focused on backend to work on TypeScript/NestJS applications with Angular frontend, building scalable server-side features and PostgreSQL schemas.
